---
name: Content review
description: Request editorial or subject-matter review of a card, checklist, module, glossary term, or source link.
title: "Content review: "
labels: [content-review]
---

## Content item
- Type: card / checklist / module / glossary / source
- Slug or source id:
- Current status:

## Review reason
- [ ] Source freshness / upcoming review date
- [ ] High-risk operational guidance
- [ ] Role/phase/scenario coverage gap
- [ ] Wording, warnings, or competence requirement
- [ ] Deprecated or superseded content

## Evidence
Link generated source ids, public references, or screenshots. Do not include patient data, private shelter locations, local filesystem paths, or restricted operational details.

## Requested outcome
Describe the concrete edit, acceptance check, and reviewer/owner.
